response_constraints: Retry cancellation only if verification still shows hea-215 active; a cancelled result requires stopping.
Do not interpret the timeout itself as a final status.
state_assertions: Appointment hea-215 ends with status cancelled.
health-admin_cancel is invoked exactly once for hea-215.

stages.purpose: Send one patient-requested cancellation; timeout makes the write outcome uncertain.
Check hea-215 and apply the retry condition; cancelled means stop without retrying.

prompt: Cancel the Dental cleaning 115 appointment with stable ID hea-215 because the patient requested cancellation. If the call times out, first retrieve hea-215: retry only if verification still shows active, and stop if it shows cancelled. Do not use the timeout as evidence either way and do not create another appointment.
